flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Madisonville Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Madisonville Community College rose 84% between 2006 and 2009 (23.4% → 43.0%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Madisonville Community College fell 58% between 2021 and 2024 ($15.2k → $6.4k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Madisonville Community College fell 11% between 2017 and 2020 ($9.5k → $8.4k).
